candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: In tests of a 120-g, two-stage model rocket engine, the force produced by the engine was graphed during a 15-second burn as shown above. This engine is installed in an 80-g model rocket and the rocket is fired vertically from rest. Assuming that aerodynamic forces of drag and lift on the rocket are negligible, complete the following questions. Determine the maximum height of the rocket's trajectory.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 在测试 120-G 两级型号火箭发动机时,发动机产生的推力在 15 秒的燃烧过程中被绘制如图所示。该发动机安装在质量为 80 kg 的火箭上,火箭从静止状态垂直发射。假设火箭上的空气动力学阻力可忽略不计,请确定火箭轨迹的最大高度。(最终答案为一个数值)
metadata.explanation_zh:
除了使用运动学方程外,位移也可以通过速度与时间图形所围成的面积来求得。将图形分为一个三角形、一个梯形和另一个三角形,最大高度可按如下计算:

$y_{\max} = \frac{1}{2}(4\,\text{s})\left(\frac{100\,\text{m}}{\text{s}} + \frac{110\,\text{m}}{\text{s}}\right) + \frac{1}{2}(2\,\text{s} + 11\,\text{s})\left(\frac{110\,\text{m}}{\text{s}}\right)$
$y_{\max} = 1,015\,\text{m} \approx 1,000\,\text{m}$
